question: How many items of clothing do I need to pick up or return from a store?

retrieval_results.context:
User will create separate notes or lists for each store for pickups and returns.
User will adopt a one-in-one-out policy for closet items
User plans to sort short-sleeve shirts from last summer.
User will use a notes app on phone to track pickups and returns
User may store winter clothes in a separate area such as a garage or attic until next winter.
User plans to store clean workout clothes properly in a well-ventilated area.
User checks short-sleeve shirts for stains, tears, fading, and missing buttons.
User stores clean workout clothes in a storage bin or bag with breathable mesh panels
User plans to store thick grey scarf and gloves in boxes for winter storage
User will use dividers or bins to separate items within a clothing category such as work, casual, and formal wear.
